name: gilfoyle
description: A skill suite for shipping reliable software, not fastest. Six skills whose every gate reaches outside the design document.

plugins.name: gilfoyle
plugins.description: Six skills (prove-it-prototype, falsifiable-design, budgeted-plan, checkpointed-build, tdd-scoped, assessing-review-feedback) that force every loop iteration to touch reality and an independent oracle before the design document signs off on itself.
